list all issues assigned to Alice
direct

Alice has 10 issues assigned to her. Two are currently overdue:

- Issue #37: a high‑priority checkout error in the E‑Learning Platform that was due on April 12, 2026 and is still marked as new.
- Issue #28: a high‑priority problem with course search returning incorrect results when using filters in the E‑Learning Platform, due April 10, 2026 and also still new.

Her other open assignments include:
- A normal‑priority login fix in the E‑Learning Platform (issue #36, new, no due date).
- A normal‑priority dashboard feature for the web Platform (issue #32, new, no due date).
- A low‑priority UI spacing improvement for course cards on the dashboard in the E‑Learning Platform (issue #29, in progress, due April 18, 2026).
- A normal‑priority database backup automation script in the E‑Learning Platform (issue #23, new, due April 20, 2026).
- A normal‑priority task to add internationalization for Arabic and French in the E‑Learning Platform (issue #18, new, no due date).
- A high‑priority live‑streaming feature for virtual classroom sessions in the E‑Learning Platform (issue #13, new, no due date).

Two issues assigned to Alice are already closed:
- An urgent XSS vulnerability in the course discussion forum (issue #9).
- A normal‑priority course progress bar that showed an incorrect percentage (issue #6).

In summary, Alice is handling 10 issues—8 open and 2 closed—with 2 of the open items overdue. The breakdown by priority is 3 high, 5 normal, 1 low, and 1 urgent; by project, 9 belong to the E‑Learning Platform and 1 to the web Platform.

Listed overdue issues and closed all resolved bugs
parallel

what are the overdue issues and close all resolved bugs
parallel

I checked the system and found six overdue issues, all in the E‑Learning Platform project. The oldest are #21 (Add real‑time chat between students and instructors) and #22 (Video streaming freezes on slow internet connections), which are 45 and 30 days late, respectively. The other overdue items are #28 (Course search returns incorrect results when using filters), #24 (Optimize homepage loading speed by lazy loading images – already closed but after its due date), #7 (Mobile app crashes when enrolling in a course with more than 50 lessons), and #37 (Checkout error).  

I also attempted to close any resolved bugs by setting their status to Closed, but there are currently no bugs in the “Resolved” status, so no action was needed there.  

Would you like me to prioritize any of these overdue issues for you?
